Justinian was deeply in love with her. H: Justinian yana son ta sosai. Ya shawo kan kawunsa, Sarki Justin I, ya soke dokar da ta haramta wa manyan jami'ai auren actresses, wanda ya bude hanyar shari'a don aurensu a shekarar 525.
Theodora was a devout Miaphysite Christi: Theodora ta kasance Kirista Miaphysite tagari, reshen Kiristanci da cocin daula ta Chalcedon ke kallo a matsayin bidi'a. Ta yi amfani da babban tasirinta don kare abokan zamanta na Miaphysites daga zalunci sannan ta kafa monasteries, wanda ya yi babban tasiri a kan addini na daular.
Did she and Justinian truly rule as equa: Shin da gaske ne ita da Justinian sun yi mulki a matsayin daidai da juna?
While Justinian held the ultimate author: Duk da cewa Justinian ne ke da babban iko a matsayin sarki, tushen tarihi ya nuna cewa Theodora ta yi amfani da babban iko. An nada ta a matsayin abokiyar mulkinsa a hukumance, sunanta ya bayyana a kan dokoki, kuma galibi tana gudanar da harkokinta na siyasa na kashin kansa, wanda ya sanya ta zama daya daqun sarauniyoyi mafi karfi a tarihi.
An haife shi a Daular Byzantine.
Arrives in the Russian lands, first docu: Ya isa kasashen Rasha, inda aka rubuta shi a karon farko a Novgorod.
Paints the frescoes in the Church of the: Ya zana frescoes a Church of the Transfiguration a kan titin Ilin, Novgorod.
Moves to Moscow and works on various com: Ya koma Moscow sannan ya yi aiki a kan ayyuka daban-daban, ciki har da na Grand Prince.
Works on the iconostasis of the Cathedra: Ya yi aiki a kan iconostasis na Cathedral of the Annunciation a Moscow Kremlin tare da Andrei Rublev da Prokhor na Gorodets.
Frescoes of the Church of the Transfigur: Frescoes na Church of the Transfiguration
Created a revolutionary set of frescoes: Ya samar da sabbin frescoes a Novgorod, wadanda aka sani da hotuna masu rai, masu ma'ana da kuma kalar monochromatic.
As a leading master in Moscow, he heavil: A matsayinsa na babban gwanaye a Moscow, ya yi tasiri sosai a kan bunkasar salo na musamman na Rasha na zana hoton icon.
Taught and collaborated with Andrei Rubl: Ya koyar da Andrei Rublev kuma ya yi aiki tare da shi, wanda yake zama daya daqun shahararrun masu zane na Rasha na Lokacin Tsakiya, inda ya mika masa tunaninsa na fasaha.
Why is he called 'the Greek'?: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'the Greek'?
To distinguish him as originating from t: Don bambanta shi a matsayin wanda ya fito daga Daular Byzantine (wadda al'adarta take ta Girka) a cikin sabon gidansa a cikin lardunan Rasha.
What is so special about his painting st: Menene na musamman game da salon zanensa?
His style was remarkably expressive and: Salonsa yana da ban mamaki da kuma nuna asalin kansa a lokacin, inda yake amfani da zane mai karfi da kuma haske na musamman ('hasken Theophanic') don nuna karfin ruhaniya maimakon kwanciyar hangali.
Did he only paint frescoes?: Shin ya zana frescoes kawai ne?
While most famous for his frescoes, he w: Kodayake ya fi shahara da frescoes, ya kasance kwararre na panel icons da manuscript illumination, kodayake ayyukansa kalilan ne suka rage.
Born into the Ashina clan and later educ: An haife shi a cikin kabilar Ashina sannan daga baya ya sami ilimi a babban birnin Tang na Chang'an.
Escapes from Tang control and persuades: Ya tsere daga ikon Tang sannan ya shawo kan Qutlugh (daga baya Ilterish Khagan) ya yi tawaye yaki da Daular Tang.
The Second Turkic Khaganate is founded;: An kafa Second Turkic Khaganate; an nada Tonyukuk a matsayin babban mai tsara dabara da kwamanda (Apa Tarkan).
Ilterish Khagan dies. Tonyukuk continues: Ilterish Khagan ya mutu. Tonyukuk ya ci gaba da aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara karkashin sabon Khagan, Qapaghan.
After Qapaghan Khagan is killed, Tonyuku: Bayan an kashe Qapaghan Khagan, Tonyukuk ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tallafa wa Bilge Khagan don tabbatar da karagar mulki yaki da juyin mulki.
Composes his own memorial inscriptions,: Ya rubuta nasa rubutun tunawa na bango, daya daqun tsoffin rubuce-rubucen adabin Turkic da suka rage, wadanda aka rubuta su a siffar mutum na farko.
Dies at an advanced age, having served t: Ya mutu yana da babban shekaru, bayan ya yi aiki ga Khagans guda uku sannan ya tabbatar da ginshikin daular.
He was the primary strategist behind the: Ya kasance babban mai tsara dabara a bayan nasarar tawaye yaki da Daular Tang, wanda ya kai ga kafa Second Turkic Khaganate a shekarar 682.
As commander-in-chief, he led Turkic arm: A matsayinya na kwamandan soja, ya jagoranci sojojin Turkic zuwa nasarori da dama yaki da Tang, Kyrgyz, da kuma Turgesh, wanda ya kare iyakokin Khaganate.
He authored his own memorial inscription: Ya rubuta rubutun tunawarsa na kashin kansa, wanda ya samar da labari na musamman na mutum na farko na kafa Khaganate da kuma babban rubutu na adabin Turkic.
Why is Tonyukuk called the 'Bismarck of: Me yasa ake kiran Tonyukuk 'Bismarck of the Turks'?
This title refers to his role as a maste: Wannan lakabi yana nuni ga rawarsa ta kwamandan soja da dan siyasa wanda, kamar Otto von Bismarck ga Jamus, ya hada mutanensa ya zama babbar daula mai karfi ta hanyar dabarar siyasa da karfin soja.
Was Tonyukuk a Khagan (emperor)?: Shin Tonyukuk ya zama Khagan (sarki) ne?
No, Tonyukuk was never a Khagan. He was: A'a, Tonyukuk bai taba zama Khagan ba. Ya kasance babban mai ba da shawara, mai tsara dabara, da kwamandan soja (tare da lakabin Apa Tarkan), yana aiki a matsayin mai iko a bayan karagar mulki ga Khagans guda uku na baya: Ilterish, Qapaghan, da Bilge.
They are among the oldest known works wr: Suna daya daqun tsoffin ayyuka da aka sani da aka rubuta da harshen Old Turkic ta amfani da rubutun Orkhon. A siffar ta musamman, labari ne na mutum na farko da dan siyasa ya rubuta, wanda ke samar da bayanai masu kima a kan siyasa, dabarun soja, da hangen nesa na manyan mutane na Turkic na farko.
Born near Kesh (modern Shahrisabz, Uzbek: An haife shi kusa da Kesh (Shahrisabz ta yanzu, Uzbekistan) a cikin kabilar Barlas.
Sustains severe injuries to his right le: Ya samu raunuka masu tsanani a kafar dama da hannunsa, wanda ya ba shi lakabin 'Timur mai Dori' (Timur the Lame).
Becomes the sovereign ruler of the Chaga: Ya zama sarki mai iko na yankunan yamma na Chagatai Khanate sannan ya kafa Samarkand a matsayin babban birninsa.
Invades India and sacks the city of Delh: Ya mamaye India sannan ya lalata birnin Delhi, wanda ya haifar da lalacewa mai girma.
Conquers Baghdad and Damascus, expanding: Ya ci Baghdad da Damascus da yaki, wanda ya fadada daularsa zuwa yamma.
Defeats and captures the Ottoman Sultan: Ya kayar da kuma kama Sultan na Ottoman Bayezid I a Yakin Ankara.
Dies in Otrar while on a campaign to con: Ya mutu a Otrar lokacin da yake tafiyar soja don cin Ming China da yaki.
He established a vast and powerful empir: Ya kafa wata babbar daula mai karfi wadda ta mamaye Tsakiyar Asiya, Gabas ta Tsakiya, da sassa na India.
His victory at the Battle of Ankara in 1: Nasararsa a Yakin Ankara a shekarar 1402 ta raunana sojojin Ottoman sannan ta jinkirta fadadarta na tsawon shekaru da dama.
His patronage of arts, architecture, and: Goyon bayansa ga fasaha, gine-gine, da kimiyya ya sauya Samarkand ya zama wuri mai kyau na al'adu sannan ya kaddamar da babban yunkuri na fasaha da ilimi.
His campaigns against Tokhtamysh decisiv: Yakokin da ya yi yaki da Tokhtamysh sun raunana Golden Horde gaba daya, wanda ya sauya ma'aunin iko a Gabashin Turai da Tsakiyar Asiya.
Was Timur a Mongol or a Turk?: Shin Timur dan kasar Mongol ne ko kuwa na Turk?
He was of Turco-Mongol descent. While he: Ya kasance dan asalin Turco-Mongol. Kodayake ya yi ikirarin gadon Mongol daga Genghis Khan don tabbatar da mulki, fadar sa da sojojinsa sun kasance na al'adu da harshen Turkic, kuma shi musulmi ne nagari.
Why was he called Tamerlane?: Me yasa ake kiran sa Tamerlane?
Tamerlane is the Europeanized version of: Tamerlane siffar Turai ce ta sunan bogi na Farsi 'Timur-i-Lang,' wanda ke nufin 'Timur mai Dori.' Wannan yana nuni ga gurguntarsa ta din-din-din da ya samu daga raunuka lokacin kuruciyarsa.
How brutal were his conquests?: Yaya rashin tausayin mamayar da ya yi take?
His campaigns were notoriously brutal. H: Yakokin da ya yi sun kasance sanannu da rashin tausayi. Ya kasance sananne wajen ba da umarnin kisan kiyashi na mutane a biranen da suka nuna masa tirjiya, wani lokacin ma yana gina hasumiya da kokon kansu a matsayin gargadi ga sauran mutane.
While his empire fractured after his dea: Duk da cewa daularsa ta rabe bayan mutuwarsa, babban gadonsa mai dorewa shi ne na al'adu. Farfadowar Timurid (Timurid Renaissance) da ya tallafa wa a Samarkand ta samar da gine-gine da fasaha masu kyau wadanda suka yi tasiri a kan yankin na tsawon karni da dama, ciki har da Daular Mughal ta baya a India.
Born in Suceava, Moldavia, to a noble Ro: An haife shi a Suceava, Moldavia, a cikin dangin sarakuna na Romania (Movila).
Becomes a monk at the Kyiv Pechersk Lavr: Ya zama monk a Kyiv Pechersk Lavra (Monastery of the Caves).
Elected Archimandrite (head abbot) of th: An zabe shi a matsayin Archimandrite (babban shugaban monastery) na Kyiv Pechersk Lavra.
Founds a school at the Lavra, emphasizin: Ya kafa makaranta a Lavra, inda ya mayar da hankali a kan ilimin addini da liberal arts.
Elected Metropolitan of Kyiv, Halych, an: An zabe shi a matsayin Metropolitan na Kyiv, Halych, da daukacin Rus'. Ya hade makarantarsa da Kyiv Brotherhood School don kafa Kyiv-Mohyla Collegium (daga baya Academy).
Convenes a council in Kyiv to discuss an: Ya kira taro a Kyiv don tattaunawa da kuma amincewa da littafin koyarwarsa, wanda zai zama shahararren 'Orthodox Confession of Faith'.
Dies in Kyiv, leaving his fortune to the: Ya mutu a Kyiv, inda ya bar dukiyarsa ga Collegium sannan ya karfafa gadonsa a matsayin babban mai gyara da kuma malami.
He established a groundbreaking institut: Ya kafa babban cibiyar ilimi na gaba wanda ke hada al'adar Orthodox da ilimin humanist na Yammacin Turai.
He oversaw the creation of a foundationa: Ya kula da samar da babban littafi wanda ke bayyana koyarwar Orthodox daki-daki don yaki da tasirin Catholic da Protestant, wanda daga baya synod na pan-Orthodox ya amince da shi.
Liturgical and Ecclesiastical Reforms: Gyaran Ayyukan Ibada da na Coci
He standardized church services, correct: Ya daidaita ayyukan coci, ya gyara littattafan ibada, sannan ya inganta ilimi da tarbiyyar limamai, wanda ya farfado da Cocin Orthodox a Ukraine.
As Archimandrite of the Lavra, he revita: A matsayinya na Archimandrite na Lavra, ya farfado da injin buga littattafai na wurin, inda ya buga littattafai na addini, ibada, da na ilimi da dama.
Why is he called Mohyla in Ukraine but h: Me yasa ake kiran sa Mohyla a Ukraine alhali sunan iyalinsa Movila ne?
His family was of Romanian (Moldavian) o: Iyalinsa sun kasance na asalin Romania (Moldavia) da sunan Movila. Lokacin da ya zama sananne a Kyiv, an daidaita sunansa zuwa harshen gida, wanda ya zama 'Mohyla' a harshen Ukraine.
It was the first institution of its kind: Ta kasance makarantar farko ta kalar ta a duniyar Eastern Slavic, wadda ke samar da ilimi mai girma da ke hada ilimin addini na Orthodox da Latin, Greek, da kuma liberal arts. Ta samar da sabbin masana masu ilimi wadanda suka tsara al'adu da addini na Ukraine na tsawon tsararraki.
Was Petro Mohyla trying to 'latinize' th: Shin Petro Mohyla yana kokarin mayar da Cocin Orthodox ta zama ta 'Latin' ne?
This is a complex historical debate. Moh: Wannan wata tattaunawa ce ta tarihi mai sarkakiya. Mohyla ya yi amfani da tsarin ilimi na Yammacin duniya na Latin da kuma harshen addini a matsayin makamai don kare da kuma bayyana Orthodoxy yaki da matsin lamba na Yamma. Masu sukar lamarin sun ce wannan ya shigo da abubuwa na kasashen waje, yayin da masu goyon baya ke cewa ya yi amfani da 'makaman abokan gaba' cikin hikima don karfafa bangaskiyarsa.
An haife shi a Votkinsk, Daular Rasha.
Studies at the newly founded Saint Peter: Ya yi karatu a Saint Petersburg Conservatory da aka kafa sabo.
His Piano Concerto No. 1 premieres in Bo: Piano Concerto No. 1 dinsa ya fara fitowa a Boston, wanda ya samu nasara nan take.
Premieres 'Swan Lake' to initial failure: Ya fitar da 'Swan Lake' wanda ya gaza a farko, ya shiga cikin auren rashin nasara, sannan ya fara rubuta wasiku na tsawon shekaru 13 da mai tallafa masa Nadezhda von Meck.
Composes his Fourth Symphony and the ope: Ya rubuta Fourth Symphony dinsa da kuma opera 'Eugene Onegin'.
The ballet 'The Sleeping Beauty' premier: Ballet na 'The Sleeping Beauty' ya fara fitowa. Nadezhda von Meck ta katse alakar su da goyon bayanta farat daya.
The ballet 'The Nutcracker' premieres in: Ballet na 'The Nutcracker' ya fara fitowa a Saint Petersburg.
Conducts the premiere of his Symphony No: Ya jagoranci fitowar Symphony No. 6 dinsa, watau 'Pathetique', sannan ya mutu bayan kwanaki tara.
Composed 'Swan Lake', 'The Sleeping Beau: Ya rubuta 'Swan Lake', 'The Sleeping Beauty', da kuma 'The Nutcracker', wadanda suka zama ginshikin repertoire na ballet.
Created a deeply personal and innovative: Ya samar da wata symphony ta kashin kansa mai cike da sabbin abubuwa wadda ake kallo a matsayin babban aiki na kade-kade na late-Romantic.
International Acclaim for Russian Music: Girmamawa ta Duniya ga Kade-kade na Rasha
Was one of the first Russian composers w: Ya kasance daya daqun mawaƙan Rasha na farko da kade-kadensu suka sami matsayi mai dorewa a duniya, wanda ya daukaka kade-kade na gargajiya na Rasha a fagen duniya.
His works are celebrated for their beaut: Ana yaba wa ayyukansa saboda kyawawan melodies masu tashi sama da kuma zurfin tunani na ruhaniya, wanda ke mayar da kade-kade na gargajiya ya kasance mai sauki ga mutane da yawa.
Ainihin dalilin mutuwa shi ne cutar amai da gudawa (cholera). Sai dai, har yanzu akwai ra'ayoyin cewa abokan karatunsa na da ne suka tilasta masa kashe kansa ta hanyar 'court of honor' don kauce wa badakala ta fili a kan kasancewarsa dan luwadi. Ainihin yanayin ya kasance batun muhawara tsakanin masana tarihi.
Did Tchaikovsky ever meet his patron, Na: Shin Tchaikovsky ya taba haduwa da mai tallafa masa, Nadezhda von Meck?
No, they deliberately never met in perso: A'a, sun zabi kada su taba haduwa da idonsu. Daukacin alakar su ta tsawon shekaru 13, wadda ta samar masa da goyon baya na kudi da na ruhaniya, an gudanar da ita ne ta hanyar wasiku kawai.
Was 'Swan Lake' successful when it first: Shin 'Swan Lake' ta samu nasara lokacin da ta fara fitowa?
No, the original 1877 production was a c: A'a, ainihin shirin na shekarar 1877 ya kasance rashin nasara ga masu sukar lamarin da mutane gaba daya, galibi sakamakon rashin choreography da tsarawa mai kyau. Ta samu matsayinta na classic ne kawai bayan mutuwarsa tare da shahararren farfadowar shekarar 1895 ta Marius Petipa da Lev Ivanov.
What does 'Pathétique', the subtitle of: Menene ma'anar 'Pathetique', lakabin Symphony dinsa ta 6?
The Russian word, 'Pateticheskaya' (Пате: Kalmar Rasha 'Pateticheskaya' (Патетическая) ta fi dacewa a fassara ta da 'mai zafi' ko 'mai cike da ji' maimakon ma'anar Turanci ta 'pathetic' ko 'pitiable'. Tana nuni ga tsananin motsin rai na symphony da kuma tsarinta na wasan kwaikwayo.
An haife shi a Caesarea, Palaestina Prima.
Appointed as adsessor (legal advisor) to: An nada shi a matsayin adsessor (mai ba da shawara kan shari'a) ga Kwamanda Belisarius.
Accompanies Belisarius on the campaign a: Ya bi Belisarius a yakin da ya yi yaki da Vandals a Arewacin Afirka.
Ya shiga cikin Yakin Gothic a Italiya.
Witnesses the outbreak of the Plague of: Ya shaida barkewar Cutar yaduwa ta Justinian (Plague of Justinian) a Constantinople.
Completes his major work, The Wars of Ju: Ya kammala babban aikinsa, The Wars of Justinian.
Ya rubuta On the Buildings of Justinian.
Authored a comprehensive eight-book hist: Ya rubuta cikakken tarihin littattafai guda takwas na yakokin da Sarki Justinian I ya yi, wanda yake zama babban tushe na lokacin.
Wrote a scandalous secret account of the: Ya rubuta labarin sirri na badakala na fadar sarki, wanda ya bayyana zargin cin hanci da rashawa da kuma rashin tausayi na Justinian da Theodora.
Eyewitness to History: Shaidan Gani da Ido na Tarihi
Provided a unique, firsthand perspective: Ya samar da hangen nesa na musamman na shaidan gani da ido a kan manyan al'amuran kamar Yakin Vandalic da Gothic da kuma Cutar yaduwa ta Justinian.
Was Procopius loyal to Emperor Justinian: Shin Procopius yana da aminci ga Sarki Justinian?
His loyalty is complex. Publicly, in wor: Amincinsa yana da sarkakiya. A fili, a cikin ayyuka kamar 'The Wars' da 'The Buildings', ya yaba wa Justinian. A asiri kuma, a cikin 'Secret History', ya soki shi da tsanani, wanda ke nuna rashin jin dadi mai zurfi.
His public works are generally considere: Ayyukansa na fili gaba daya ana kallon su da inganci ga al'amuran soja da na siyasa, kodayake suna da wariya ga fadar sarki. 'Secret History' tana da wariya sosai kuma tana cike da gulma, amma tana samar da wani labari na daban mai kima, kodayake da karin gishiri, ga labarin hukuma.
What was his relationship with General B: Yaya alakar sa take da Kwamanda Belisarius?
He served as Belisarius's legal advisor: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan shari'a da sakatare na Belisarius na tsawon shekaru da dama. Duk da cewa rubuce-rubucensa na fili suna yaba wa kwamandan, 'Secret History' kuma ta hada da suka, wanda ke nuna alaka mai sarkakiya wadda ta lalace bayan lokaci.
Born in Cappadocia, son of the Exarch of: An haife shi a Cappadocia, dan Exarch na Afirka.
Overthrows the tyrannical Emperor Phocas: Ya hambarar da azzalumin Sarki Phocas sannan aka shelanta shi sarki a Constantinople.
The Sassanid Persian army under Khosrow: Sojojin Sassanid Persian karkashin Khosrow II sun kwace Jerusalem sannan suka kwace Giciye na Gaskiya (True Cross).
Personally leads a series of brilliant a: Ya jagoranci wasu yakokin soja masu hazaka da jaruntaka da kansa yaki da Daular Sassanid.
After defeating the Persians, recovers t: Bayan ya kayar da Persians, ya dawo da Giciye na Gaskiya sannan ya mayar da shi Jerusalem a cikin tattaki na nasara.
Makes Greek the official language of the: Ya mayar da Helenanci harshen kasa na hukumance na Daular, yana musanya Latin, sannan ya karbi lakabin 'Basileus'.
The Byzantine army suffers a catastrophi: Sojojin Byzantine sun fuskanci babban kashi mai tsanani yaki da sojojin Rashidun Caliphate a Yakin Yarmouk.
The provinces of Syria, Palestine, and E: Sojojin Larabawa da ke ci gaba sun ci lardunan Syria, Palestine, da kuma Egypt da yaki.
Dies in Constantinople, having saved the: Ya mutu a Constantinople, bayan ya kare daular daga abokin gaba daya amma ya shaida yadda wani abokin gaban daban ya rarraba ta.
Personally led a series of brilliant cam: Ya jagoranci wasu yakoki masu hazaka da kansa wadanda suka kawo karshen yakin shekaru 26 sannan suka murkushe abokin hamayyar Daular Byzantine na shekaru da dama.
Initiated the Theme system, dividing pro: Ya kaddamar da tsarin Theme, inda ya raba larduna zuwa yankunan soja, wadanda suka zama ginshikin tsaron Byzantine na tsawon karni da dama.
Hellenization of the Empire: Mayar da Daula ta zama ta Girka (Hellenization)
Changed the official imperial language f: Ya canza harshen daula na hukumance daga Latin zuwa Helenanci, wanda ke nuna al'adun gaskiya na daular sannan ya nuna sauyi daga asalin Roma zuwa Byzantine.
Why is Heraclius considered a great mili: Me yasa ake kallon Heraclius a matsayin kwamandan soja mai girma?
He abandoned conventional strategies, pe: Ya bar dabarun yaki na yau da kullum, ya jagoranci sojojinsa da kansa a kan yakoki na jaruntaka a cikin kasar abokan gaba, sannan ya kayar da Sassanid Persians gaba daya duk da cewa sun fi shi yawa.
What was the significance of changing th: Menene mahimmancin canza harshen kasa na hukumance zuwa Helenanci?
It was a major step in the transition fr: Ya kasance babban mataki a kan sauya tsari daga 'Daular Roma ta Gabas' zuwa 'Daular Byzantine,' inda ya yarda cewa ginshikinta na al'adu da mutane na Girka ne, ba wai Latin ba.
If he was so successful, why did he lose: Idan ya samu nasara sosai, me yasa ya rasa yankuna da yawa ga Larabawa?
Decades of war with Persia had completel: Yakokin da aka shafe shekaru da dama ana yi da Persia sun cinye dakarun soja da na kudi na Daular Byzantine gaba daya, wanda ya bar ta cikin hadari ga sabbin sojojin Larabawa masu karsashi.
An haife shi a matsayin Chen Yi kusa da Luoyang, Henan.
Ya zama monk na addinin Buddhist gaba daya.
Begins his journey to India, defying the: Ya fara tafiyarsa zuwa India, inda ya bijire wa dokar Sarki ta haramta tafiye-tafiye.
Travels throughout India, studying at Na: Ya yi tafiya a daukacin India, yana karatu a Jami'ar Nalanda da tara littattafan addini.
Returns to the Tang capital, Chang'an, w: Ya koma babban birnin Tang, Chang'an, tare da littattafan addini na Buddhist guda 657.
Completes his famous travelogue, 'Great: Ya kammala littafinsa na tafiye-tafiye mai shahara, 'Great Tang Records on the Western Regions'.
Leads a large state-sponsored translatio: Ya jagoranci babban aikin fassara da gwamnati ke daukar nauyi har zuwa mutuwarsa.
Undertook a 17-year, 10,000-mile overlan: Ya gudanar da tafiya ta kasa na shekaru 17 mai nisan mil 10,000 zuwa India don samun littattafan addini na Buddhist na gaske.
Translated over 1,330 fascicles of Buddh: Ya fassara sassan littattafan addini na Buddhist sama da 1,330 zuwa harshen Sinanci, wanda ya bayyana sannan ya fadada koyarwar Buddhist a Gabashin Asiya sosai.
Great Tang Records on the Western Region: Great Tang Records on the Western Regions
Authored a detailed travelogue that rema: Ya rubuta cikakken littafin tafiye-tafiye wanda har yanzu yake zama babban tushe ga tarihi da yanayin kasa na karni na 7 na Tsakiyar Asiya da India.
Established the Faxiang (Yogacara or 'Mi: Ya kafa makarantar Faxiang (Yogacara ko 'Mind-Only') ta addinin Buddhism a China, wata babbar al'ada ta falsafa.
Is Xuanzang the 'Tripitaka' from 'Journe: Shin Xuanzang ne 'Tripitaka' daga 'Journey to the West'?
Yes, the historical Xuanzang was the ins: E, ainihin Xuanzang na tarihi shi ne asalin da ya yi wahayi ga kirkirarren mutum Tang Sanzang (Tripitaka) a cikin shahararren littafin Sinanci 'Journey to the West'. Sai dai, littafin tatsuniya ne kawai, kuma ainihin tafiyarsa ba ta hada da sarkin biri ko aljanin alade ba.
Why was his journey illegal?: Me yasa tafiyarsa ta kasance ta haram?
In the early Tang Dynasty, Emperor Taizo: A farkon Daular Tang, Sarki Taizong ya haramta wa mutanensa tafiye-tafiye zuwa kasashen waje saboda rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa da barazana a iyakoki. Dole ne Xuanzang ya sulale ya fita daga daular.
While his journey was legendary, his mos: Kodayake tafiyarsa ta kasance mai ban mamaki, gudunmawarsa mafi dorewa shi ne aikin fassara mai girma da daki-daki da ya yi. Fassaran dinsa suna da inganci sosai wanda suka zama ma'auni na tsawon karni da dama sannan suka tsara ci gaban addinin Buddhism a China, Korea, da kuma Japan.
Born in Chornukhy, Cossack Hetmanate, in: An haife shi a Chornukhy, Cossack Hetmanate, a cikin dangin Cossack.
Intermittently studied at the Kyiv-Mohyl: Ya yi karatu lokaci-lokaci a Kyiv-Mohyla Academy, inda ya yi fice a harsuna, kade-kade, da kuma falsafa.
Served as a singer in the Imperial Chape: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai rera waka a Imperial Chapel da ke St. Petersburg.
Traveled through Europe as part of a mis: Ya yi tafiya a daukacin Turai a matsayin bangaren wani aiki, inda kila ya ziyarci Hungary, Vienna, da sauran cibiyoyin ilimi.
Taught poetics and ethics at Pereiaslav: Ya koyar da ilimin waka (poetics) da tarbiyya (ethics) a Pereiaslav da Kharkiv Collegiums, amma an kore shi saboda hanyoyinsa da ra'ayoyinsa da ba a saba da su ba.
Began his life as an itinerant philosoph: Ya fara rayuwarsa a matsayin masanin falsafa mai yawo, yana tafiya a fadin Ukraine, yana koyarwa, da kuma rubutu.
Died in the village of Ivanivka (now Sko: Ya mutu a kauyen Ivanivka (yanzu Skovorodynivka), bayan an ce ya tona kabarinsa da kansa a ranar da ta gabaci mutuwarsa.
He laid the foundations for Ukrainian na: Ya kafa ginshikin falsafar gida ta Ukraine da ayyukansa a kan sanin kai, farin ciki, da kuma 'duniyoyi uku'.
Developed the influential idea that true: Ya samar da ra'ayi mai tasiri cewa ana samun farin ciki na gaske ta hanyar yin aikin da ya dace da dabi'ar mutum ta dabi'a.
Authored numerous philosophical dialogue: Ya rubuta tattaunawa ta falsafa da dama, tatsuniyoyi ('Fables of Kharkiv'), wakoki ('The Garden of Divine Songs'), sannan ya kera kade-kade na coci.
Why is he called the 'Ukrainian Socrates: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Socrates na Ukraine'?
Like Socrates, he taught through dialogu: Kamar Socrates, ya koyar ta hanyar tattaunawa, ya jaddada sanin kai ('San kanka'), sannan ya rayu cikin sauki da tsantsani, yana kalubalantar ka'idojin al'umma ba tare da ya rubuta falsafarsa a cikin littafi mai tsari ba.
No, none of his works were published dur: A'a, babu daya daqun ayyukansa da aka buga lokacin yana raye. Sun yadu ne a siffar rubutun hannu (manuscript) a tsakanin abokansa da mabiyansa, wanda ya kasance al'ada a lokacin.
What does his epitaph, 'The world tried: Menene ma'anar rubutun kabarinsa, 'Duniya ta yi kokarin kama ni, amma ta kasa'?
It symbolizes his lifelong rejection of: Yana nuna alamar kin yarda da ya yi a rayuwarsa ga sha'awoyi na duniya kamar dukiya, matsayi, da takura na hukuma don samun 'yanci na ruhaniya da na ilimi.
Born in Washington, County Durham, Engla: An haife ta a Washington, County Durham, England.
Graduates from Oxford with a first-class: Ta kammala karatu a Oxford da babban digiri na farko (first-class honours) a tarihin zamani.
Begins serious study of Arabic and makes: Ta fara karatu na gaske na harshen Larabci sannan ta yi tafiyarta ta farko mai girma zuwa hamadar Siriya.
Recruited by British Intelligence at the: Hukumar Leken Asiri ta Birtaniya (British Intelligence) ta dauke ta aiki lokacin barkewar Yakin Duniya na Farko.
Appointed Oriental Secretary to the Brit: An nada ta a matsayin Oriental Secretary ga Babban Kwamishinan Birtaniya a Baghdad.
Plays a key role in the Cairo Conference: Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a Taron Alkahira, tana goyon bayan samar da kasar Iraq karkashin Sarki Faisal I.
Establishes the Baghdad Archaeological M: Ta kafa Baghdad Archaeological Museum (daga baya Iraq Museum).
Dies in Baghdad from an overdose of slee: Ta mutu a Baghdad sakamakon shan kwayoyin barci da yawa, wanda ake kyautata zaton kashe kanta ta yi.
Architect of Modern Iraq: Mai Gina Kasar Iraq ta Zamani
She was instrumental in drawing the bord: Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen zana iyakokin sabuwar kasar da kuma nada Faisal I a matsayin sarkinta.
She established the national museum in B: Ta kafa gidan kayan tarihi na kasa a Baghdad don kiyaye tsohon gadon al'adu na Mesopotamia.
Pioneering Explorer and Archaeologist: Majagaba na Masu Bincike da Masu Hakar Kayan Tarihi
Her extensive travels and detailed surve: Tafiye-tafiye na musamman da cikakken bincike na hamadar Larabawa da ta yi sun samar da bayanai masu kima na sirri da fahimtar al'adu.
Was Gertrude Bell a spy?: Shin Gertrude Bell 'yar leken asiri ce?
While she worked for British Intelligenc: Duk da cewa ta yi aiki ga Hukumar Leken Asiri ta Birtaniya kuma ta tara bayanai, rawarta ta fi zama ta jami'ar siyasa da jakadiya, tana amfani da babban iliminta na yankin don tsara manufofi.
Why is she called the 'Queen of the Dese: Me yasa ake kiran ta 'Sarauniyar Hamada'?
This nickname reflects her unparalleled: Wannan lakabi yana nuna ikonta na musamman na yin tafiya a daukacin hamadar Larabawa da kuma tasirin alakarta da shugabannin kabilu masu iko.
Her most lasting, and complex, legacy is: Gadonta mai dorewa kuma mai sarkakiya shi ne kasar Iraq ta zamani, wadda ta taimaka wajen samar da iyakokinta da tsarin siyasa. Iraq Museum ita ce gadonta na al'adu da aka fi yaba wa.
Born as Nader Qoli in the Khorasan provi: An haife shi a matsayin Nader Qoli a lardin Khorasan na Persia.
Enters the service of the Safavid claima: Ya shiga aikin Safavid Tahmasp II sannan ya zama babban kwamandansa.
Deposes the last Safavid ruler and is cr: Ya hambarar da sarkin Safavid na karshe sannan aka nada shi Shah na Persia, wanda ya kafa daular Afsharid.
Invades the Mughal Empire, defeats their: Ya mamaye Daular Mughal, ya kayar da sojojinsu a Yakin Karnal, sannan ya lalata babban birnin, Delhi.
Conquers Bukhara and Khiva, expanding th: Ya ci Bukhara da Khiva da yaki, wanda ya fadada daular Persia zuwa girmanta mafi girma a zamanin yanzu.
Assassinated by a group of his own offic: Wasu rukunin jami'ansa suka kashe shi, wanda ya haifar da rushewar daularsa cikin sauri.
He expelled Afghan, Ottoman, and Russian: Ya kori mamaya na Afghan, Ottoman, da kuma Rasha, wanda ya kawo karshen lokaci na rudani sannan ya sake hada kasar karkashin mulkinsa.
He built a powerful, modern standing arm: Ya gina dakarun soja da na ruwa masu karfi na zamani, wanda ya mayar da Persia kasa mafi karfin soja a yankin.
His successful invasion of the Mughal Em: Nasarar mamaye Daular Mughal da lalata Delhi da ya yi ya kawo dukiya mai yawa, ciki har da Peacock Throne da lu'u-lu'u na Koh-i-Noor, zuwa Persia.
Why is Nader Shah called the 'Napoleon o: Me yasa ake kiran Nader Shah 'Napoleon na Persia'?
He is compared to Napoleon for his brill: Ana kwatanta shi da Napoleon saboda dabarunsa na soja masu kyau, hawan sa daga dangi na talakawa don ya zama sarki, da kuma gagarumin mamayarsa.
His reign grew increasingly tyrannical a: Mulkinsa ya zama mai tsanani da nuna fargaba na zalunci, musamman bayan wani yunkurin kisa. Rashin tausayinsa da haraji mai tsanani sun haifar da bore a ko'ina sannan kwamandojinsa suka kashe shi a karshe.
What is his most famous loot from India?: Menene ganimarsa mafi shahara daga India?
He plundered the Mughal treasury in Delh: Ya kwashe dukiyar Mughal a Delhi, inda ya dauki abubuwa masu kima na tarihi kamar Peacock Throne da lu'u-lu'u na Koh-i-Noor da Daria-i-Noor.
An haife shi a Tekirdag, Daular Usmaniyya.
Joins the secret society of the Young Ot: Ya shiga cikin kungiyar sirri ta Young Ottomans.
Flees to London and Paris, co-publishes: Ya gudu zuwa London da Paris, inda ya hada hannu wajen buga jaridar Hurriyet (Freedom).
Stages his play Vatan Yahut Silistre (Fa: Ya shirya wasan kwaikwayonsa Vatan Yahut Silistre (Fatherland or Silistra), wanda ya kai ga tura shi gudun hijira a Famagusta, Cyprus.
The first Ottoman Constitution is declar: An shelanta tsarin doka (Constitution) na farko na Ottoman; Kemal ya yi aiki a kwamitin tsara ta.
Sultan Abdülhamid II suspends the consti: Sultan Abdulhamid II ya dakatar da tsarin dokar sannan ya sake tura Kemal gudun hijira.
Ya mutu a gudun hijira a tsibirin Chios.
He was a leading intellectual force in t: Ya kasance babban jagoran ilimi a cikin yunkurin Young Ottomans, wanda ya goyi bayan tsarin mulki na sarauta (constitutional monarchy) da kuma zamanantarwa.
Pioneering Turkish Playwright and Noveli: Majagaba na Marubutan Wasan Kwaikwayo da Novel na Turkish
Authored the influential play 'Vatan Yah: Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo mai tasiri 'Vatan Yahut Silistre' da kuma novel na farko na Turkish na zamani, 'İntibah' (Awakening).
He popularized the concepts of 'vatan' (: Ya yada manufofin 'vatan' (mahaifa) da kuma 'hürriyet' ('yanci), wanda ya kafa ginshikin tunani ga kishin kasa na Turkish na zamani.
What were the Young Ottomans trying to a: Menene Young Ottomans suke kokarin cimmawa?
The Young Ottomans were a secret society: Young Ottomans sun kasance kungiyar sirri ta masana wadanda ke son gyara Daular Usmaniyya. Sun nemi hada ra'ayoyin demokradiyya na Yamma, kamar tsarin doka da majalisa, da ka'idojin Musulunci don samar da asalin Ottoman na zamani da dunkulewa sannan su yaki mamayar Turai.
Why was his play 'Vatan Yahut Silistre': Me yasa wasan kwaikwayonsa 'Vatan Yahut Silistre' ya kasance mai matukar cece-kuce?
The play, depicting the heroic defense o: Wasan kwaikwayon, wanda ke nuna kariya ta jaruntaka na wani sansani lokacin Yakin Crimean, ya tada karsashin kishin kasa mai tsanani a tsakanin masu kallo. Zanga-zangar jama'a da ta biyo baya gwamnati ta kalle ta a matsayin kalubale kai-tsaye ga ikon Sultan, wanda ya kai ga kama Kemal da tura shi gudun hijira.
What is Namık Kemal's legacy in modern T: Menene gadon Namik Kemal a kasar Turkey ta zamani?
He is revered as a national hero and the: Ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa da kuma 'Mawaƙin Mahaifa.' Ra'ayoyinsa a ka tsarin doka, kishin kasa, da 'yanci sun yi tasiri sosai a kan yunkurin Young Turk kuma, a karshe, a kan Mustafa Kemal Ataturk, wanda ya kafa Jamhuriyar Turkey.
Born in Tus, Khorasan, Persia (modern-da: An haife shi a Tus, Khorasan, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
Takes refuge with the Nizari Isma'ilis (: Ya nemi mafaka a wurin Nizari Isma'ilis (Assassins), inda a karshe aka tsare shi a Alamut Castle.
